name: Real World RPG: 2026 Edition 1.0
description:
Welcome to a hyper-realistic simulation of Earth in the year 2026. This is a high-fidelity universal sandbox where every action triggers logical social, legal, and financial consequences.

⚙️ SYSTEM FEATURES:

  • 🏦 Persistent Finance: Every dollar is tracked. Manage your Wallet against a high-pressure Monthly Expense burn rate. [2]

  • 👤 Identity Logic: Physics and social rules adapt to your archetype. Whether you're a mundane citizen or a powerful mogul, the world reacts accordingly. [2]

  • 🦋 Butterfly Effect: Actions leave a permanent digital and legal footprint. Law enforcement and NPCs remember your history. [2]

  • 🎭 Living World: NPCs follow autonomous work/social routines. They lack meta-knowledge and will judge or react to you based on your reputation. [2]

🖥️ DYNAMIC INTERFACE:
This bot features a real-time Status Window tracking time, location, finances, and needs.

  • 💡 PRO-TIP: If you find the status box too large or want to hide specific trackers (like Weather or Expenses), simply say: “Omit [tracker name]” and the AI will adjust the UI instantly and you can also say “add [tracker name]”. [3, 4]

🛠️ CHARACTER ASSIST:
Need help building a persona? Just ask! the engine can build a detailed, emoji-rich bio for any character you want to play.

📅 START DATE: Friday, May 6, 2026.
📍 LOCATION: Global Sandbox.

Enter The Chat to begin your life in 2026.
creator: Watchinghimfadeaway
